skillpacks.name: 01-academic-writing
skillpacks.scene: 课程作业、实验报告、论文科研写作与 LaTeX 交付

skillpacks.name: 02-project-delivery
skillpacks.scene: 完整项目文档流、软件工程交付、求职作品集和甲方交付材料

skillpacks.name: 03-tech-sharing
skillpacks.scene: 技术知识文档、群聊分享、内部资料整理和 Obsidian 导出 PDF

skillpacks.name: 04-presentation-demo
skillpacks.scene: 演示 PPT、reveal.js、演讲稿、展示 checklist、用户指南和成果展示材料

skillpacks.name: 05-governance-core
skillpacks.scene: 达尔文机制、工程防呆、命名规范、版本控制、质量审查和 skill 演化治理
